$comment: Fixture manifest for PEAC conformance testing. This file contains metadata about fixtures so the fixture files themselves can be pure receipts. The 'version' field indicates the minimum PEAC protocol version required to validate the fixture (fixture pack format version, not repo release version). Fixture-pack files (those with 'version' at top level) MUST include 'schema_version' matching their protocol version.

minimal-receipt.json.description: Minimal valid PEAC receipt - only required fields

full-receipt.json.description: Full PEAC receipt with all fields populated

control-chain.json.description: PEAC receipt with multi-step control chain (CAL)

subject-snapshot.json.description: PEAC receipt with subject profile snapshot

attestation-single.json.description: PEAC receipt with single attestation (risk assessment type)

attestation-multiple.json.description: PEAC receipt with multiple attestations (risk + KYC)

extensions.json.description: PEAC receipt with namespaced extensions in auth and evidence blocks

missing-iss.json.description: Missing required 'iss' field in auth context

missing-iat.json.description: Missing required 'iat' field in auth context

invalid-type.json.description: Wrong type for 'iat' field (string instead of number)

empty-evidence.json.description: Empty evidence block (valid - no payment or attestation)

null-values.json.description: Explicit null for optional evidence block
null-values.json.note: null is not valid for object types with additionalProperties: false

max-depth.json.description: Deeply nested but valid structure (tests depth handling)

valid-actor-binding.json.description: Valid ActorBinding conformance fixtures (DD-142, DD-143, v0.11.3+)

invalid-actor-binding.json.description: Invalid ActorBinding conformance fixtures (DD-142, DD-144, v0.11.3+)

edge-cases.json.description: Edge case DisputeAttestation golden vectors including runtime tests (v0.9.27+)

valid.json.description: Valid Issue() input golden vectors with invariant-based assertions (v0.9.29+)

invalid.json.note: Evidence non-finite/depth tests are language-specific unit tests, not cross-language fixtures

evaluation.json.description: Policy evaluation golden vectors with first-match-wins semantics (v0.9.29+)

validation.json.description: Policy document validation golden vectors including empty-rules-valid case (v0.9.29+)

enforcement.json.description: Policy enforcement HTTP mapping golden vectors using locked API (v0.9.29+)

invalid.json.description: Invalid DisputeBundle golden vectors with error codes (v0.9.30+)

determinism.json.description: Determinism tests for cross-language parity of report_hash (v0.9.30+)

issuer-config.json.description: PEAC issuer configuration parsing and validation vectors (v0.10.0+)

policy-manifest.json.description: PEAC policy manifest parsing and validation vectors (v0.10.0+)

valid.json.description: Valid WorkflowContext and WorkflowSummaryAttestation golden vectors (v0.10.2+)

edge-cases.json.description: Edge case workflow correlation vectors including limits testing (v0.10.2+)

invalid.json.description: Invalid InteractionEvidenceV01 vectors with expected error codes (v0.10.7+)

edge-cases.json.description: Edge case InteractionEvidenceV01 vectors with warnings (v0.10.7+)

rfc9421-proof.json.description: RFC 9421 proof capture extension vectors with org.peacprotocol/rfc9421-proof@0.1 extension

invalid-partial-commerce-amt-only.json.description: Has amt but missing payment -- must fail as E_PARSE_COMMERCE_INVALID

invalid-commerce-wrong-types.json.description: Commerce receipt with amt as string -- must fail as E_PARSE_COMMERCE_INVALID

edge-attestation-with-accidental-amt.jso.description: Attestation-shaped but has amt key -- classified as commerce, fails as E_PARSE_COMMERCE_INVALID

edge-unknown-top-level-keys.json.description: Extra keys beyond schema -- rejected by strict schemas

next-action-hints.json.description: Agent recovery next_action hint table (DD-132, DD-133); best-effort guidance, not normative

valid.json.description: Valid Content-Usage header parsing fixtures (AIPREF vocab-03, RFC 9651)

edge-cases.json.description: Edge case Content-Usage header parsing fixtures (RFC 9651 value type handling)

golden-vectors.json.description: FingerprintRef round-trip conversion golden vectors (DD-146, v0.11.3+)

credential-event.json.description: Credential event extension conformance fixtures (DD-145, v0.11.3+)

tool-registry.json.description: Tool registry extension conformance fixtures (DD-145, v0.11.3+)

control-action.json.description: Control action extension conformance fixtures (DD-145, v0.11.3+)

key-rotation.json.description: Key rotation lifecycle conformance fixtures (DD-148, v0.11.3+)

valid-full.json.description: Full carrier with all optional fields

valid-embed-no-optional.json.description: Embed carrier with receipt_jws but no other optional fields

valid-http-reference.json.description: HTTP reference-only carrier within 8KB header limit

valid-with-receipt-url.json.description: Valid carrier with receipt_url locator hint (DD-135)

invalid-receipt-url-http.json.description: Invalid carrier: receipt_url uses HTTP instead of HTTPS (DD-135)

invalid-receipt-url-too-long.json.description: Invalid carrier: receipt_url exceeds 2048 character limit (DD-135)

replay-prevention/boundary-jti-length.js.description: Wire 0.2 replay prevention: jti at maximum length boundary

kinds/conformance.json.description: Wire 0.2 kind semantics conformance vectors (Section 5, DD-164)

types/conformance.json.description: Wire 0.2 type grammar conformance vectors (Section 6, DD-164)

pillars/conformance.json.description: Wire 0.2 pillar taxonomy conformance vectors (Section 7, DD-164)

issuers/conformance.json.description: Wire 0.2 issuer canonical form conformance vectors (Section 8, DD-164)

occurred-at/conformance.json.description: Wire 0.2 occurred-at semantics conformance vectors (Section 9, DD-164)

jose/conformance.json.description: Wire 0.2 JWS header constraints conformance vectors (Section 10, DD-164)

policy-binding/conformance.json.description: Wire 0.2 policy binding conformance vectors (Section 11, DD-164)

extensions/conformance.json.description: Wire 0.2 extension groups conformance vectors (Section 12, DD-164)

identifier-stack/conformance.json.description: Wire 0.2 identifier stack conformance vectors (Section 18, DD-164)

validation/conformance.json.description: Wire 0.2 validation algorithm conformance vectors (Section 19, DD-164)

replay/conformance.json.description: Wire 0.2 replay prevention conformance vectors (Section 20, DD-164)

challenge.json.description: Wire 0.2 challenge body conformance vectors (Section 13, DD-158)

dual-stack.json.description: Wire 0.2 dual-stack compatibility conformance vectors (Section 15, DD-158)

conformance.json.description: Transport boundary conformance vectors (CARRIER-* namespace, DD-124 through DD-131)
